title: Established Window & Gutter Cleaning Business – High Recurring Revenue
supportTraining: Two weeks at 20 hours per week.
description:
This profitable, home-based window and gutter cleaning business has been serving Santa Clara County and parts of the East Bay for over 40 years. The owner is retiring, creating a rare opportunity to take over a well-established business with a strong repeat customer base, minimal overhead, and excellent growth potential.

The company generates approximately $200K in annual revenue with Seller’s Discretionary Earnings of $116K. Work is split 50/50 between residential and commercial clients, many of whom have used the business for years. Services include window cleaning (75% of revenue), gutter cleaning (25%), and solar panel cleaning (small but growing). The business and historical financial information has been reviewed and pre-qualified for SBA financing up to 85% of the total project cost.

The business is owner-operated, with the owner working full time managing customer relationships, sales, scheduling, and less demanding cleaning duties while one full-time technician handles the more demanding physical work. The owner's spouse supports bookkeeping and dispatch.

The sale includes a work van, full equipment for a two-person crew, and a customer database with detailed service history. Turnkey and ideal for an owner-operator or service company looking to expand.

Ad#:2389517
